title: cynanchum luteum
intro: Cynanchum luteum, also known as Yellow Milk Vine, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Cynanchum luteum can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its potential health benefits to be harnessed through herbal preparations.
